title: Simply Coffee
description: Simply adding the best drink to Minecraft... Coffee!
body:
The Simply Coffee Mod is back!

 

Finally! We get what we have always wanted, Coffee, now Minecraft is complete!
 
This mod adds Coffee plants, a white mug, a glass mug, and paper cups to drink your Java.
Who doesn't want Coffee?

 

 

 

The first step is to find a Coffee Fruit, which is obtained by finding a Coffee plant in a Jungle biome.
This fruit can be used to plant a Coffee plant or to make a cup of coffee.



Coffee is planted on grass or dirt and is ready for harvest when the red berries are visible. When right-click and it will drop 4 Coffee Fruit.

By placing a Coffee  Fruit into the crafting grid, it will produce two Raw Coffee Beans.

 
![Placing coffee fruit in a crafting slot yields raw coffee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6382630c94a6d6ecf81554529f94951c98f4bd0.png)



Now it needs to be roasted, place it into the furnace to get a Roasted Coffee Bean.

 
![Placing raw coffee in a furnace yields roasted coffee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e14852c064b014fa64045f3f13d35be1b2c967e.png)



Now we need a Mortar and Pestle to grind the Beans

 

![Mortar and Pestle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/098543000e6b3f2221e2e9e669a6dc60abe7e270.png)

 

Now we will grind the roasted beans but don't worry, the Mortar and Pestle will not get consumed.

 
![Ground Coffee Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92032a2342009c2c5546cfa146f50601353ca58a.png)



Now we need to make a Ceramic Mug.

![Clay Cup Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9a8b5732da2a614ff49a44d62071ef40bc4a4bc.png)




Smelting Quartz in a furnace will make Melted Quartz, and using the recipe below will make a Ceramic Mug ready for coffee!

 


![Melted Quartz Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac25fb951aada2016a8999b75572ea813d6a2225.png)

![Ceramic Mug Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a06f73f043808a8573ead3d1dca771e583bf0da5.png)
 

Or you could make a Glass mug that functions exactly like a Ceramic Mug.

 
![Glass Mug Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e025a1180b5ca1a09e1781e5c8a49382b95d2e6.png)



With an empty mug in hand, right-click a water block to fill it like a bottle.
​
In the crafting table, add grounds to the Mug with Water to make "Unbrewed Coffee".
Place the "Unbrewed" Coffee into the furnace to get Black Coffee that you can drink.
Keep in mind that a Glass mug uses the same recipes.



![Unbrewed Coffee Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/880fae69a86e6bc0edb7d28e041b97bb7f58f9e4.png)
 
![Black Coffee Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8bac6758ef31d438f88e10c7d5299b3d33cee79.png)
 



Now you can drink Coffee!! You will get your cup back after drinking, so don't worry :)

Place the Black Coffee in the Crafting grid with Milk, and/or Sugar in any order to make the following:

(In any order, meaning you can make Coffee with Sugar first, then add Milk to that to make Coffee, Milk, and Sugar or add Milk and Sugar to Hot Coffee to make it as well)

 

 

 

Coffee with Milk

 

![Coffee with Milk Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1575616bfd45da737792de40a3ce916a721487a.png) 

 

Coffee with Sugar

 

![Coffee with Sugar Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a645cdeb17277d00245d98634d617fa117eea59d.png)

 

Coffee, Milk, and Sugar

 

![Coffee with Milk and Sugar Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1c58776bcc33096f8feb72a571e8a6d55d0ee53.png)

 

You can also add Sugar to Coffee with Milk to get this


![Coffee with Milk adding Sugar Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4ec41d08f0a4fde3f53e970effdb8c773b4694.png)

 

Espresso,

is made using four ground coffee, and then brewed in the furnace. The effects of Espresso last longer than Black Coffee.

You can only drink Espresso from mugs

 

![Espresso Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/457b3705416aba8358b6095e5af74f360d2474fb.png)


 

Double Shot Espresso is made with 8 coffee grounds instead of 4 and then brewed in the furnace.

Double Shot Espresso has a longer duration effect than Espresso.


![Double Shot Espresso Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c58b079953a77fa37fbc1dff1e01864beef9afd3.png)

 

**You can only drink Espresso from mugs 
**
 

Cappuccino is made from Espresso, Frothed Milk, and Sugar. (Note: Glass mugs can be used as well)

 

![Cappuccino Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a39690c0342ec1129568c6260d1dbf824b61d22.png)

 

 
To make frothed milk, you will have to make a milk frother.

 

![Milk Frother Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/253316262464572ced1124d512c72abd944e17e9.png)

 

Next, you have to put milk into a bowl. (Note: This will not consume your bucket)


![Bowl of Milk Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03159ffa8f0488146729ba37a5af9ba522db67cd.png)
 

Now make the frothed milk.


![Frothed Milk Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/900439d863c338e24a349c975e594ae537269cb9.png)
 

 

 

Paper Cups are less expensive than Ceramic Mugs and aren't reusable.  Paper cups use five pieces of paper and make five paper cups.
To use a paper cup, right-click with it in hand and Brewed Black Coffee in your inventory to fill it.
​You will get your mug back.
 

![Paper Cup Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca676ae70aaa8db43589087d459f2b636d05ba22.png)

 

You can now add milk and sugar to it,  just as if it were a mug.

 

 

 

​Each Drink has a Potion Effect! See below​
 

![Coffee Effect Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e5c6e158af852624984b8fab07979e4e721c3d6.png)
 

This Mod and all textures made for this mod, are made by me, the author of this mod, and are not to be reproduced, re-posted, sold, or used in any other mod without permission. Use of mod in modpacks is welcomed!

 

 

Credit to MCreator, in which this mod was made.
